panels.description: Medium shot: Mina Murray sitting at a tidy wooden desk in a sunlit classroom, ink quill in hand, focused and determined expression, piles of student papers and a chalkboard in the background.

bubbles.text: My dearest Lucy, I long to be with you. Being an assistant schoolmistress is noble, but I hope to be useful to Jonathan in ways beyond these walls.

panels.description: Medium close-up: Mina practicing shorthand in a notebook, soft side-lighting, stack of books nearby, thoughtful expression as she visualizes her future as a chronicler.

bubbles.text: I am mastering shorthand. I want to keep a diary—to capture every conversation, every detail, so nothing precious is ever forgotten.

panels.description: Close-up: Lucy Westenra in a lush Victorian garden, pouting playfully at a letter in her hand, vibrant flowers blurred in the background.

bubbles.text: My dearest Mina! Your letters are so rare. If only you could see this handsome, curly-haired stranger the town is whispering about.

panels.description: Medium shot: Lucy strolling through a sunny park, holding a parasol, looking excited as she talks to a companion off-screen about a potential suitor for Mina.

bubbles.text: Town is lovely today. I must tell you—I met a man, and he is just the sort of refined, intelligent match I have been hoping for you.

panels.description: Close-up: Lucy looking into a decorative mirror, expression filled with sudden, intense realization, soft dramatic lighting capturing her reflection.

bubbles.text: He works at a lunatic asylum, yet his demeanor is so remarkably calm—as if he reads souls. I find myself looking into my own reflection, wondering if I am so easily deciphered.
